response.justification: Sarah is a highly experienced software engineer with over 15 years in the industry, far exceeding the 6+ year requirement. She possesses deep expertise in the primary tech stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and has direct, recent experience with AI agent infrastructure, which perfectly aligns with the job description. Her strong background in TDD, cloud technologies, and system architecture makes her an exceptional candidate for this Senior Fullstack role.
strengths: Extensive experience with the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and cloud/container ecosystems (AWS, Kubernetes, Docker).
Direct, recent experience building AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflows.
Exceptional testing background, including creating custom test runners and teaching TDD workshops.
concerns: Lacks explicit mention of Nest.js and Vitest, though her deep Node.js and testing background mitigates this.
As a Staff Engineer and Founder, she may be slightly overqualified for a standard Senior Individual Contributor role.
Recent experience heavily highlights NoSQL (MongoDB) over relational databases (PostgreSQL/MySQL).
